name: coSetSDOTimeout
title: coSetSDOTimeout
syntax: void coSetSDOTimeout( dword time, dword errCode[] );
description: The function sets the time after which a SDO transmission is aborted if the communication partner does not response. The default value is 2000 ms and applies globally for all SDO transmission.

parameters.name: time
parameters.description: Time value in ms, value range 0..60000
